philippines.title: Philippine Food Expo 2026 opens: A grand showcase of Filipino flavors, innovation, and global trade opportunities
philippines.description:
The 18th Philippine Food Expo (PFE) 2026 officially opens from 17–19 April 2026 at the World Trade Center Metro Manila, running daily from 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM, bringing together the country’s leading food, beverage, agriculture, and export industry stakeholders in one landmark trade event. Organized by PHILFOODEX Inc., PFE 2026 continues its legacy as the Philippines’ premier all-Filipino food trade exhibition—now expanding further with a stronger international presence and broader industry participation. The Opening Ceremonies began with the Department of Agriculture Ribbon Cutting Ceremony leading up to the official opening program of the 18th edition of The Philippine Food […]...
Keep on reading: Philippine Food Expo 2026 opens: A grand showcase of Filipino flavors, innovation, and global trade opportunities

philippines.title: Spikers’ Turf Finals: Savouge forces deciding Game 3 vs Criss Cross
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines — First-time finalist Savouge stayed alive and prevented Criss Cross from clinching a second straight title with a 25-22, 25-21, 25-19 win in Game 2 of the 2026 Spikers’ Turf Open Conference finals on Friday at Filoil Centre. From Mark Calado carrying the load in the series opener, the Spin Doctors came out firing with a balanced attack as Shawie Caritativo, Giles Torres, and JP Bugaoan stepped up when it mattered most. JC Enarciso was also a revelation as a main setter for Savouge in Game 2, while Calado put on the finishing touches before substitute Madz Gampong […]...
Keep on reading: Spikers’ Turf Finals: Savouge forces deciding Game 3 vs Criss Cross

philippines.title: Mandaue rolls out four-day onsite workweek, sees initial confusion
philippines.description:
MANDAUE CITY, Cebu — The Mandaue City Government has begun implementing its four-day onsite workweek, with a work-from-home arrangement for some employees every Friday, as part of efforts to conserve energy amid rising fuel costs. Under the setup, employees are required to report to their offices from Monday to Thursday, while those whose tasks can be done remotely are allowed to work from home on Fridays. On the first day of implementation, some individuals still went to City Hall to process transactions, either unaware of or having forgotten the new arrangement. READ: Mandaue job order workers to get full pay […]...
Keep on reading: Mandaue rolls out four-day onsite workweek, sees initial confusion

energy.title: A Ceasefire, a Blockade, and a Clock Running Out for Trump
energy.description: Conflict Update (as of 12:00 a.m. ET, April 18) The U.S. rushed to lock in a 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire starting on Thursday because the Lebanon front was starting to blow up the Iran talks. The Lebanon ceasefire did not get off to a smooth start, with Israeli strikes continuing right up to the deadline, killing civilians, and Hezbollah openly signaling it doesn’t trust the deal. Iran backed the Lebanon pause immediately and tied it to its own ceasefire with Washington, making clear it expects the regional fighting to be part of any…

energy.title: How Israel Is Trying to Turn Washington Against Ankara
energy.description: Israel failed to demonstrate any meaningful gains in its own version of the war with Iran. Now, it needs a new enemy to target, and preferably one that would cause a dangerous wedge. The target is Turkey, a very important U.S. ally in this conflict, and Netanyahu is now publicly attempting to tie Erdogan to Iran and its proxies. Simultaneously, the propaganda machines are working overtime, with U.S. media now taking the Israeli “think tank” bait and questioning Turkey’s place inside NATO, pointing to Hamas links and Muslim Brotherhood…

usStocks.description: The semiconductor world is witnessing a historic surge as one of its biggest names breaks records from decades ago. On Thursday, Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) extended its winning streak to 12 consecutive days, a feat the company has not achieved in over 20 years. Investors are flocking to the stock as the combination of new technology and a cooling global conflict creates an ideal combination for growth.
